title: Staple's AFK Display
description: Adds an [AFK] tag to players' names when they have been away for more than 5 minutes.
body:
## Need help? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/2698cavvue).

## Overview
**Staple's AFK Display** is a data pack that adds the [AFK] prefix to a player's name after they have not moved for 5 minutes. Once any movement is detected by the server, the player's name returns back to normal.
